title: Google Chrome security advisory (AV26-517)
description: On May 27, 2026, Google published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following product:
products: Stable Channel Chrome for Desktop   versions prior to0.7778.216/217 (Windows), 148.0.7778.215/216 (Mac) and 148.0.7778.215 (Linux)
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
